slots.prompt: Create a photorealistic natural asset for a fictional subtropical mountain village with no real-world identity. The required subject is: simple weathered wooden work bench. Frame one complete rural object at human scale with all sides legible, neutral grounding, crisp edges and material wear suitable for later 3D interpretation.
